5803256520686699694.questionText: A planning combination of educational, political, regulatory and organizational support for action conditions of living conducive to health of individuals, groups or community

options: Process which empowers families and communities to improve quality of life
Emphasize not only prevention of disease but the promotion of positive good health
Process of enabling people to increase control over and improve their health
Enable person to control over their wellbeing
Raise the level of health of an individual, families and community
